prompt: Show a color picker using ColorPicker.Root with a ColorArea.Root child — import both ColorPicker from '@tale-ui/react/color-picker' and ColorArea from '@tale-ui/react/color-area'. Use <ColorArea.Root> (NOT <ColorArea>) inside ColorPicker.Root. Do NOT use useState or import from @internationalized/color. Use defaultValue with a plain CSS string on ColorPicker.Root.
